command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.118 '
echo === PHASE B: REPO CLONE WITH TOKEN ===

# Clean up failed init
rm -rf /opt/moreno-ai/.git

# Clone with Gitea token embedded in URL
git clone http://jose:044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6@192.168.0.191:3000/jose/Moreno-AI.git /opt/moreno-ai 2>&1 | tail -5

echo --- VERIFY ---
cd /opt/moreno-ai
git log --oneline -3
git remote -v
git status | head -3
echo "Runtime files:"
ls runtime/*.py 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo "Agent dirs:"
ls agents/ 2>/dev/null

echo "--- IMPORT TEST ---"
python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "/opt/moreno-ai/runtime"); from agent_identity_loader import load_all_agents; print("import OK")" 2>&1 || true

echo PHASE_B_DONE
' 2>&1
